TableExtension Vehicle Master Ext - Field CBM Capacity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the number of trip plans with low utilization that have been approved.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension Warehouse Worker WMS Cue Ext - Field TripApproved - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.target: يعرض عدد خطط الرحلات ذات الاستخدام المنخفض التي تمت الموافقة عليها.

trans-unit.note: TableExtension Warehouse Worker WMS Cue Ext - Field TripApproved - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the number of trip plans with low utilization that have been rejected.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension Warehouse Worker WMS Cue Ext - Field TripReject - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.target: يعرض عدد خطط الرحلات ذات الاستخدام المنخفض والتي تم رفضها.

trans-unit.note: TableExtension Warehouse Worker WMS Cue Ext - Field TripReject - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the number of trip plans that are pending approval due to low utilization.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension Warehouse Worker WMS Cue Ext - Field TripSendApproval - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.target: يعرض عدد خطط الرحلات التي في انتظار الموافقة عليها بسبب قلة الاستخدام.

trans-unit.note: TableExtension Warehouse Worker WMS Cue Ext - Field TripSendApproval - Property Caption
ReportExtension NSR report - ReportColumn ExpectedFreightAmount - Property Caption
